headline: Pinnacle West Capital (PNW) Price Target Raised to $97
summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corporation (NYSE:PNW) is included among the 11 Best Utility Stocks to Buy for Dividends in 2026. Pinnacle West Capital Corporation (NYSE:PNW) is an energy holding company that conducts business through its subsidiaries, Arizona Public Service Company, El Dorado Investment Company, and Pinnacle West Power. On February 27, Barclays increased its price target […]
